original_statement: how many years did they make the playoffs?
mutated_statement: how many years did they do something?
mutation_analysis: Verb-phrase replacement + Specificity/generalization: "make the playoffs"被替换为模糊占位词"do something" (make the playoffs → do something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中“Explanation: The question appears to ask how many years they made the playoffs (i.e., ‘did something’ in the playoffs column). Counting years… That totals 7 years.”以及simple_query的thought（将“did something”解释为“made the playoffs”并列出2001、2002等年份）的表述，可识别出Agent意识到原问题模糊性并进行了推测。Agent没有向用户反问或请求澄清，而是直接采用假设性的映射（make the playoffs ← do something）、统计符合项并给出具体答案“7”。因此符合“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”的定义：承认不明确但基于假设给出具体答案。
